title: Pathways from Contaminated Water to Human Disease
description: A flowchart illustrating the distinction between waterborne diseases (ingested) and water-induced diseases (contact or insect vectors), their causes from e-waste pollution, and their health impacts.
relationships: E-waste leachate contaminates water sources with heavy metals and pathogens
Exposure route determines the category of disease
Each category leads to a set of specific illnesses
